tipRules.tip: Yama Craw with Mega Floater Formula makes buoyant jig trailer - claws float up in defensive posture mimicking real crawfish sensing danger. Great for flipping jig and football jig
Yama Craw buoyancy makes claws float up behind football jig in defensive crawfish posture. Perfect for bottom-hopping presentations
Yama Craw on Carolina rig floats entire bait up out of silt and off the bottom, putting it right in face of bass on the prowl
Yama Craw buoyancy on swim jig allows fishing same jig slower or increasing jig weight for casting range while keeping bait at same level in water column

knowledge.insight: Yamamoto Yama Craw uses entirely different material from Senko - Mega Floater Formula. Softer, spongier, very buoyant. Not as stretchy as ElaZtech but more durable than hand-poured plastics
Yama Craw buoyancy changes presentation for Texas rig, wobble heads, magnum shaky heads, jig trailers, Tokyo rig, and Carolina rig - claws float up in defensive crawfish posture
Yama Craw will work wonders during spawn with claws floating right up in bedding bass's face
